name: continuum
description: Vendor-neutral context observability and optimisation system for AI coding agents

scripts.test:acceptance: pnpm --filter @continuum/context-engine build && pnpm --filter @continuum/mcp-server build && pnpm --filter @continuum/cli build && pnpm --filter @continuum/cli exec vitest run tests/standalone-acceptance.test.ts --testTimeout=120000 --hookTimeout=60000 && pnpm --filter @continuum/mcp-server exec vitest run tests/session-product.test.ts --testTimeout=120000 --hookTimeout=60000
